AboutSection.title: About Me
AboutSection.bio: I'm a passionate developer with a knack for creating elegant solutions in the least amount of time. I have a strong background in both front-end and back-end development, with extensive experience in building scalable and maintainable applications. My journey in web development started with a deep curiosity for how things work, and it has evolved into a career where I can blend technical skills with creative problem-solving.

ProjectShowcase.title: My Projects
ProjectShowcase.subtitle: Here are some of my recent projects from GitHub. Explore them to see my skills in action.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.text: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. For detailed information on the subject of data protection, please refer to our <link>privacy policy</link>.

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.introduction: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. We treat your personal data confidentially and in accordance with the statutory data protection regulations and this privacy policy.

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.text: The data controller responsible for data processing on this website is:

hosting.title: Hosting with GitHub Pages
hosting.text1: This website is hosted by GitHub Inc. (GitHub). When you visit our website, GitHub may collect certain information, such as your IP address, browser type, operating system, and the date and time of your visit, in server log files. This data is collected by GitHub for security and operational purposes.
hosting.text2: The use of GitHub Pages is based on our legitimate interest in a reliable and professional presentation of our online presence (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR). We have no control over the data processing by GitHub. For more information on how GitHub handles user data, please see GitHub's Privacy Statement:

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.text1: This website uses technically necessary cookies. Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device and do not cause any harm.
cookies.text2: We use a functional cookie ('locale') to save your language preference. This serves our legitimate interest in providing a user-friendly website. This cookie is stored for one year or until you clear your browser's cookies. We do not use any cookies for tracking or advertising purposes.

contactForm.title: Contact Form (via mailto:)
contactForm.text: If you use our contact form, clicking the 'Send Message' button will open your default email client with a pre-filled email. No data is stored or processed on our web server during this process. The processing of your data then takes place within your email program and is subject to the privacy policy of your email provider. We will process the data you send us via email to handle your inquiry.

googleFonts.title: Google Fonts
googleFonts.text: This website uses so-called web fonts provided by Google for the uniform display of fonts. When you call up a page, your browser loads the required web fonts into your browser cache to display texts and fonts correctly. For this purpose, the browser you are using must connect to Google's servers. This allows Google to know that our website has been accessed via your IP address. The use of Google Fonts is in the interest of a uniform and appealing presentation of our online services.

githubApi.title: Fetching Projects from GitHub API
githubApi.text: To display my current projects, this website fetches data from the GitHub API directly from your browser. When this data is requested, your browser sends a request to GitHub's servers, which may include your IP address. This is technically necessary to provide the project overview. GitHub's privacy policy applies.

userRights.title: Your Rights as a Data Subject
userRights.text: You have the right to receive information about the origin, recipient, and purpose of your stored personal data at any time, free of charge. You also have a right to request the correction, blocking, or deletion of this data. Furthermore, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.text: This privacy policy was created to the best of our knowledge and belief but does not constitute legal advice. For a legally compliant design, consulting a lawyer is recommended.
